"'''Hired Guns'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, by [[Sterling Hershey]] in [[2005]]. It depicts a battle between the vicious [[Blackstar Raiders]] and a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] hired to eliminate them.

==Plot summary==
The [[Blackstar Raiders]] have terrorized planets for months. Anticipating the raid, [[Medara's Outpost]] has hired [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] protection. The Raiders cleverly insert a small force and a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] to find the depot, but has revealed himself to the guards.

A fight ensues as the Raiders attempt to steal components from the depot.
